text: The sense of the Hebrew text seems to be, ‘A bribe is a talisman for him who owns it; wherever he turns, he prospers’.
The Hebrew text is commonly interpreted as meaning, ‘The beginning of a quarrel is as when a man opens a sluice; let it alone, before trouble breaks out’.
The second part of this verse is found in the Septuagint Greek, but not in the Hebrew text.
